song_name: Lady Gaga And Bruno Mars - Die With A Smile - Joji - Glimpse Of Us
version_description: Mashup Version of 3 big artists bringing in some deeper and more sad vibe on the original song "Die with a Smile", by Lady Gaga and Bruno Mars.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Notes:
- Structure was taken from the best tab on this site
- Shown for no capo to match original recording and live performances
- For easier chords, transpose -2 and capo 2nd fret
- Original YT Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_UgA589vMFk
